smsBody: Hi Probably Fine — my garage door needs a look. Here's what's happening:
secondaryKeywords: same-day garage door repair Metro Vancouver
voice: deadpan-reassuring, dry, confident; resolve the joke instantly then prove it with hard trust signals
signatureHook: We're not 'probably' fine. We're genuinely great.
localDetails: coastal rain & salt air rust springs and cables
tri-cities mountain cold snaps spike spring failures
older East Van character homes & laneway garages
newer Surrey & Richmond builds with double doors

design.motionPersonality: crisp/snappy — confident quick reveals, a deadpan status-check device

imagery.styleBlock: photorealistic documentary photography, natural Pacific-Northwest daylight, soft overcast, realistic skin and materials, candid, ordinary true-to-life working people, no studio lighting, no retouching
imagery.brandBlock: crew wears navy-blue work jackets with small amber chest logo and navy caps; white Ford Transit wrapped confident blue with amber stripe, 'Probably Fine Garage Doors' + 'info@probablyfinegaragedoors.ca' on the side, BC plate; brand colours blue & amber
imagery.rules: real average blue-collar people (not models); Metro-Vancouver homes & streets; EMAIL ok on wraps, NEVER a phone number

otherPricing.diagnosticNote: waived when the repair goes ahead

partnerProgram.headline: We get more calls than we can take — partner with us for vetted overflow jobs
